description_en: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokémon.
Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
Damages the foe landing the finishing hit.
Attack power increases by 30% if the Pokémon is the last Pokémon to attack this turn.
Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.
Notifies all trainers upon entering battle if an opponent has a super-effective move, self destruct, explosion, or a one-hit KO move.
Prevents priority moves against this Pokémon and allies.
Protects allies from attacks that limit their move choices.
Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat when it takes a hit that causes its HP to become half or less.
Protects the Pokémon from Defense-lowering attacks.
Powers up Fire-type moves when HP is low.
Protects the Pokémon from some ball and bomb moves.
Restores HP upon eating a Berry, in addition to the Berry's effect.
Doubles Speed during strong sunlight.
Prevents stat reduction.
Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.
Boosts the Sp. Atk stat sharply when a stat is lowered.
Raises accuracy.
Inverts stat changes.
This Pokémon can inflict poison on Poison and Steel Pokémon.
Eats a consumed berry again at end of next turn.
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.
Has a 30% chance of Disabling any move that hits the Pokémon.
Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokémon on contact.
Prevents self-destruction.
Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.
Prevents the first instance of battle damage.
The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.
Summons rain that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle.
Reduces HP if it is hot. Water restores HP.
Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.
If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.
Powers up each Pokémon's Fairy-type moves.
Reduces the power of supereffective attacks that hit the Pokémon.
Has a 30% chance of burning attacking Pokémon on contact.
Powers up if hit by fire.
Prevents lowering of ally Grass-type Pokémon’s stats.
Changes the Pokémon's type and appearance based on the weather in battle.
Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokémon to 0.75×.
The Pokémon can check the foe’s held item.
Halves damage from physical moves.
Raises flying moves' priority by one stage.
Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.
Ups ATTACK if suffering.
May create another Berry after one is used. 100% chance in sunshine.
Sometimes cures the status conditions of the Pokémon's allies.
Halves damage from fire moves and burns.
Doubles the Pokémon's weight.
When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.
Doubles the Pokémon's Attack stat.
The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of each turn.
Trades accuracy for power.
Heals status conditions when it is raining.
Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokémon.
The Pokémon regains HP in a hailstorm.
By illuminating its surroundings, the Pokémon prevents its accuracy from being lowered.
Takes on the appearance of the last party member.
Prevents poison.
Transforms into the foe on entry.
Passes through the opposing Pokémon's barrier, substitute, and the like and strikes.
Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit by the amount equal to its last HP.
The Pokémon's intensely focused, and that prevents it from flinching.
Prevents sleep.
When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.
Powers up punching moves.
Raises Attack when hit by Dark-type moves.
Prevents accuracy from being lowered.
Can't use held items.
Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.
By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.
Halves the Pokémon's weight.
Redirects single-target electric moves to this Pokémon where possible.  Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.
Prevents paralysis.
All sound-based moves become Water-type moves.
Moves don't make contact.
Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.
The Pokémon only takes damage from attacks.
The Pokémon steals the held item of a Pokémon it hits with a move.
Prevents freezing.
Increases Defense to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
Powers up pulse moves.
Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.
This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.
Changes the Pokémon’s type depending on the terrain.
Powers up with PLUS.
Reflects stat-lowering effects back.
Moves can be used on the target regardless of its Abilities.
Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
Absorbs electric moves, raising Speed one stage.
Boosts Attack after knocking out any Pokémon.
Reduces damage taken when HP is full.
Contact with this Pokémon spreads this Ability.
All status conditions heal when the Pokémon switches out.
Ensures that all moves used by and against the Pokémon land.
Prevents attraction.
If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.
Protects against damage from weather.
Strengthens grass moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
Prevents confusion.
Parent and child each attack.
Steals attacking Pokémon's held items on contact.
May pick up items.
When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal.
Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
Powers up with MINUS.
Heals for 1/8 max HP after each turn when poisoned in place of damage.
Poisons foe on contact.
Has a 30% chance of poisoning target Pokémon upon contact.
Gives priority to the Pokémon's status moves.
Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.
Changes the Pokémon's type to the type of the move it's about to use.
Doubles the Pokémon's Attack stat.
Prevents status and halves Ghost damage.
Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.
Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.
Boosts Speed if there is a status problem.
Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during rain.
The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.
Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2× their power.
Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.
Raises Attack if the foe is of the same gender.
Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.
Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.
Boosts the power of Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves in a sandstorm.
Doubles Speed during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.
The Pokémon summons a sandstorm when it enters a battle.
Ups evasion in a sandstorm.
Raises Attack when hit by Grass-type moves.
The Pokémon can hit Ghost-type Pokémon with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.
When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.
The Pokémon steps on the opposing Pokémon's shadow to prevent it from fleeing or switching out.
Powers up slicing moves.
Heals the body by shedding.
Removes additional effects from moves but increases their power.
A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.
Prevents added effects.
Maximizes the number of times multistrike moves hit.
Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a hailstorm.
Powers up moves if they become critical hits.
Raises evasion in a hailstorm.
The Pokémon makes it snow when it enters a battle.
In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat is boosted, but HP decreases every turn.
Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.
Protects against sound-based moves.
Gradually boosts SPEED.
When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.
The Pokémon moves after even slower foes.
Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.
Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.
Changes aegislash to Blade Forme before using a damaging move, or Shield Forme before using kings shield.
Paralyzes on contact.
Raises Speed one stage upon flinching.
Helps repel wild POKéMON.
Prevents a held item from being removed by other Pokémon.
The Pokémon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.
Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead.  Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.
Raises moves' critical hit rates one stage.
Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.
Attack and Special Attack are boosted for each party Pokémon that has been defeated.
Doubles Speed on Electric Terrain.
Strengthens bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
Prevents itself and ally Pokémon from falling asleep.
Doubles Speed during rain.
Passes the bearer's held item to an ally when the ally uses up its item.
Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokémon that inflicted them.
Raises evasion if the Pokémon is confused.
Powers up weak moves so the Pokémon can deal more damage with them.
Protects against friendly Pokémon's damaging moves.
The Pokémon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage taken from Fire- and Ice-type moves.
Ups WATER moves in a pinch.
Powers up moves that make direct contact.
Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.
When it enters a battle, the Pokémon copies an opposing Pokémon's Ability.
Ignores the opposing Pokémon's stat changes.
Doubles Speed upon using or losing a held item.
Prevents foes from eating berries.
The Pokémon can deal damage with moves that make physical contact, even if the target is protected.
Turns electricity into HP.
Exchanges ability with attacker on contact.
Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move.
Lowers the power of Fire-type moves done to the Pokémon and prevents the Pokémon from getting a burn.
Physical attacks lower Defense and raise Speed.
Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.
Transforms into its Hero Form when switching out.
